description: Document written in Zawīlat al-Mahdiyya with a validation written by the court of Fustat, as denoted in Hebrew אשרנוהו (in the validation of the court). The main document concerns a shipment of goods which was sent by Yaḥyā b. Mūsā and which did not include trading goods for Salmān b. Shabīb ha-Kohen. Salmān claims his goods in front of the court. The document mentions Yisrael b.Yūsuf Ibn Bānūqa and others. It is dated: Thursday, 19 Tammuz 4807 AM, which is 1047 CE. Witnesses: Khallūf b. Yehuda; Barhūn b. Moshe b. Barhūn; Yiṣḥaq b. Yaʿaqov .The validation is in the handwriting of Efrayim b. Shemarya. Other witnesses: Avraham b. Mevasser; the cantor Yefet b. David (b. Shekhanya). (Gil, Kingdom, 4: 106-7, Doc. #633; S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:236-7, 574; and Oded Zinger, Women, Gender, and Law, 402). EMS and VMR
description_he: שטר מזאוילת אל-מהדייה, מאושר בידי בית הדין בפוסטאט, על משלוח סחורות ששלח יחיא בן מוסא ולא כלל את סחורת סלמאן בן שביב הכהן. ה' תמוז 4807 (1047). בכתב אפרים בן שמריה.
